title: docs: regenerate APIDOCS.md
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Auto-generated from OpenAPI spec changes after a successful production deploy.

gist.headline: The sacred texts are updated
gist.blurb: Our automated scribes just synced the latest API documentation. Fresh endpoints and parameters are now officially on the record.
gist.summary: Automatically regenerated APIDOCS.md to reflect the latest OpenAPI spec changes from production.
gist.impact: Developers have access to the most up-to-date API documentation for their integrations.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot acting as scribes or reading a giant glowing scroll/book of documentation in a cozy library.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-head robot reading a glowing magical scroll of code together in a warm library. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
